summary: Testing of Multi-Firm Inventory & Compliance System - Phase 1. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright testing.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console, not blocking)

seed_data_creation: Created test firms and raw materials during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Firm Inventory System Phase 1 fully verified. Key compliance rules working: 1) No direct stock editing - all changes through ledger entries, 2) Mandatory invoice number for transfers (GST compliance), 3) Negative stock prevention. Two main firms exist: 'MuscleGrid Pvt Ltd' and 'MuscleGrid Energy Solutions'. Stock transfers create dual ledger entries (transfer_out + transfer_in).

firm_crud.GET /api/firms: PASS - Lists all firms with filtering by is_active
firm_crud.POST /api/firms: PASS - Creates firm with GSTIN validation

raw_material_crud.GET /api/raw-materials: PASS - Lists materials with firm filtering
raw_material_crud.POST /api/raw-materials: PASS - Creates material with firm association
raw_material_crud.PATCH /api/raw-materials/{id}: PASS - Updates material (cannot change stock directly)

inventory_ledger.POST /api/inventory/ledger (purchase): PASS - Adds stock via purchase entry
inventory_ledger.negative_stock_prevention: PASS - Rejects entries that would cause negative stock
inventory_ledger.GET /api/inventory/ledger: PASS - Lists ledger entries with filters

stock_transfer.mandatory_invoice_validation: PASS - Rejects transfer without invoice number
stock_transfer.POST /api/inventory/transfer: PASS - Creates transfer with dual ledger entries
stock_transfer.same_firm_rejected: PASS - Prevents transfer to same firm
stock_transfer.insufficient_stock_rejected: PASS - Prevents transfer exceeding available stock

stock_view.GET /api/inventory/stock: PASS - Returns stock levels with low stock alerts
stock_view.GET /api/inventory/stock-by-firm: PASS - Returns stock grouped by firm

admin_firms_ui.stat_cards: PASS - Total Firms, Active Firms, Inactive Firms displayed
admin_firms_ui.firms_table: PASS - Shows firm name, GSTIN, state, contact, status
admin_firms_ui.create_firm_dialog: PASS - All form fields present with data-testid
admin_firms_ui.action_buttons: PASS - View, Edit, Toggle status buttons work

accountant_inventory_ui.stat_cards: PASS - Total Raw Materials, Active Firms, Low Stock Alerts, Recent Transfers
accountant_inventory_ui.tabs: PASS - Current Stock, Raw Materials, Ledger, Transfers tabs work
accountant_inventory_ui.add_ledger_dialog: PASS - Entry type, firm, item, quantity fields present
accountant_inventory_ui.transfer_dialog: PASS - Mandatory invoice warning displayed prominently
accountant_inventory_ui.stock_table: PASS - Shows SKU, Name, Firm, Unit, Stock, Reorder Level, Status
accountant_inventory_ui.transfers_table: PASS - Shows Transfer #, Item, From, To, Quantity, Invoice #, Date, By

compliance_rules_verified.no_direct_stock_editing: PASS - Stock only changes through ledger entries
compliance_rules_verified.mandatory_invoice_for_transfers: PASS - Transfer API rejects empty invoice with 400 error
compliance_rules_verified.negative_stock_prevention: PASS - Adjustment/transfer rejected when insufficient stock
compliance_rules_verified.dual_ledger_entries_for_transfers: PASS - transfer_out and transfer_in entries created
